mod.name: Buy premium command
mod.author: The Forgotten Server
mod.talkaction:
domodlib('buypremium_config') if(getPlayerPremiumDays(cid) > config.maxDays) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, "Você já possui " .. config.days .. " dias de premium account.") doSendMagicEffect(getPlayerPosition(cid), CONST_ME_POFF) return end
if(not doPlayerRemoveMoney(cid, config.cost)) then doPlayerSendCancel(cid, "Custo: 2 dias por 10 Diamantes.") doSendMagicEffect(getPlayerPosition(cid), CONST_ME_POFF) return end
doPlayerAddPremiumDays(cid, config.days) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, "Você comprou " .. config.days .. " dias de premium account por 10 diamantes.")
